name: KNOWLES CORP.  DL-,01
summary: Knowles Corporation designs and manufactures micro-acoustic, audio processing, and precision device solutions. They provide components for mobile communications, consumer electronics, hearing health, and other markets, with headquarters in Itasca, Illinois. TICKER: Knowles Corporation designs and manufactures micro-acoustic, audio processing, and precision device solutions for various markets, including mobile communications, consumer electronics, and hearing health.
